entities.name: OILSEED CROPS
entities.description: Crops that produce oil-rich seeds used for various industrial and dietary purposes

entities.name: ALLELE MINING
entities.description: The strategy of searching for and identifying specific alleles within a gene pool to improve crop traits

entities.name: GENOME ELUCIDATION
entities.description: The process of determining the complete DNA sequence and structure of a genome

entities.name: SUPERIOR ALLELES
entities.description: Specific versions of genes that confer desirable agronomic or resilience traits

entities.name: HAPLOTYPES
entities.description: Groups of genes within an organism that were inherited together from a single parent

entities.name: GENE EXPRESSION
entities.description: The process by which information from a gene is used in the synthesis of a functional gene product

entities.name: GENE PREDICTION
entities.description: The process of identifying the regions of genomic DNA that encode genes

entities.name: GLOBAL GERMPLASM COLLECTIONS
entities.description: Repositories of genetic material from various plant species and varieties worldwide

entities.name: WILD ALLIED SPECIES
entities.description: Species closely related to cultivated crops found in the wild

entities.name: LOCAL LANDRACES
entities.description: Traditional varieties of a crop developed over time by farmers in a specific location

entities.name: PCR-BASED ALLELE PRIMING
entities.description: A technique using Polymerase Chain Reaction to identify specific alleles

entities.name: ECO-TILLING-BASED ALLELE MINING
entities.description: A method using Eco-TILLING to identify mutations or alleles in a population

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: The use of molecular markers and genomic tools to select for desired traits in breeding

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns affecting crop adaptation

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of a plant that are important for agricultural production and yield

entities.name: GENOMIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Data and tools derived from genome sequencing used for crop improvement

entities.name: GENE DISCOVERY
entities.description: The identification of new genes and their functions within a genome
